title: campanula mollis f. longicornis
intro: Campanula mollis f. longicornis, also known as the long-horned bellflower, is a plant species belonging to the bellflower family. It is used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The long-horned bellflower has been used to treat various health issues, such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, and is believed to offer health benefits such as reducing inflammation and improving wound healing. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are consumed to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
